crime.name: Broken getaway car
crime.descr: Remove all birds in your zone with a level less than 0. Earn $1 for each bird removed.

crime.name: Negotiate
crime.descr: Remove a "Hostage Bird" from your zone. If you do, earn $2 and you can add a bird from your deck that is level 0 or lower.

crime.name: Good bird
crime.descr: When hired, remove any "Bad Bird" you control. While you control this bird, the cost of birds in your zone with a negative level become 0.

crime.name: Bad bird
crime.descr: When hired, remove any "Good Bird" you control. When hired, also remove any birds with a level 0 or below and earn $2 for each bird removed.

crime.name: Bandit Bird
crime.descr: During main phase, you can steal $1 from an opponent.

crime.name: Sabotage Bird
crime.descr: During main phase, place 1 token on this bird. During main phase, you can remove all tokens from this bird to remove another opponents bird that has the same level or below the number of tokens removed, and gain money equal to the level of that bird.

crime.name: An inside job
crime.descr: Place face-down. You can flip this card and move another player's bird to your zone until the end phase.

crime.name: Put the money in the bag!
crime.descr: Place face-down. If removed or flipped by another player, you steal money from that player equal to the absolute level of their zone.

crime.name: Switchblade
crime.descr: When another player hires a bird, earn money equal to it's absolute level and flip it face-down.

casual.name: Undo
casual.descr: Remove a card in your zone.

casual.name: Number 2 pencil
casual.descr: Earn $1 for every bird in your zone.

casual.name: Downsize
casual.descr: Remove all face-down cards in a player's zone.

casual.name: Basic Bird
casual.flavor: This bird just started it's career

casual.name: Night Shift Bird
casual.descr: During main phase, you can remove this bird to draw 1 card.

casual.name: Intern Bird
casual.descr: When removed, you can return this bird to your hand.
casual.flavor: A bird that just can't get enough experience

casual.name: Evaluation
casual.descr: Place face down. When flipped, earn money equal to the level of your zone and return this card to your hand.

casual.name: Cubicle
casual.descr: During pay phase, earn $1 for each adjacent bird.

casual.name: Dismissal
casual.descr: Remove any level 1 penguin on the field.

casual.name: Lucky  break
casual.descr: If a player wants to remove one or more cards in your zone or hand. Cancel the removal of one of those cards.

airplane.name: Pre-flight meeting
airplane.descr:
You can either:

* add 1 "Crew Bird" from your deck to your hand and shuffle your deck.

* add 1 "Crew Bird" from your discard pile to your hand.

airplane.name: Captain Bird
airplane.descr: Once per turn, if a "Crew Bird" is removed from your zone, you can add it to your hand.

airplane.name: Passenger Bird
airplane.descr: During main phase, you can hire up to 2 "Crew Bird" from your hand. If this bird is removed, lose $2.

airplane.name: Co-pilot Bird
airplane.descr: During main phase, you can remove a "Crew Bird" from your zone to remove 1 card from the field. If this bird is removed, lose $2.

airplane.name: Crew Bird
airplane.descr: If this bird is removed, lose $2.

airplane.name: Great Airport
airplane.descr: You can only control 1 "Great Airport". During main phase, you can earn $1 for each "Crew Bird", "Passenger Bird", and "Co-pilot Bird".

airplane.name: Crash landing
airplane.descr: Remove all "Crew Bird" you control and earn $3 for each one.

airplane.name: Fast-track
airplane.descr: If there is a "Co-pilot Bird" or "Passenger Bird" in your discard pile, you can remove one "Crew Bird" you control and place it in your zone.
